results.rendered_html: nirvikalpa (nis + vi˚) adj. keine Alternative habend, — zulassend  VYUTP. 172 . ˚kalpo 'smi  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 80,b,18 . samādhi  Spr. 23 . recognising no such distinctions as that of subject and object ( BALLANT. )  VEDĀNTAS.(Allah.) No. 124  [Page4-0211] (˚kalpaka v. l.)  BĀLAB. 27 .  DHŪRTAS. 88,1 . jñānaṃ yannirvikalpākhyaṃ tadatīndriyamiṣyate a knowledge which is without determination ( RÖER )  BHĀṢĀP. 57 . ˚kalpam adv. ohne zu schwanken, ohne sich zu bedenken  PAÑCAT. I, 59 .
